text: For the open-gate 20S CP-PI31 structure the chains from the published models of the human 20S CP (PDB 8QYO) along with the chains of PI31 (PDB 8FZ6) were individually fitted into the cryo-EM map with ChimeraX.

extractions.extracted_text: For the open-gate 20S CP-PI31 structure the chains from the published models of the human 20S CP (PDB 8QYO) along with the chains of PI31 (PDB 8FZ6) were individually fitted into the cryo-EM map with ChimeraX.

For the open-gate 20S CP-PI31 structure the chains from the published models of the human 20S CP (PDB 8QYO) along with the chains of PI31 (PDB 8FZ6) were individually fitted into the cryo-EM map with ChimeraX.
